title: TAPPaaS Environment
description: An Environment is a per-tenant deployment context (ADR-007c). It owns the public domain(s), DNS mode, network zone reference, data-residency, backup retention, and legal processor for a set of services. It replaces the configuration.json '.tappaas.variants' construct. ownerOrg references a People Organization by name; network.zone references a zone in zones.json; neither is a free string. NOTE: tlsCertRefid is NOT an authored field here — whether a cert ref exists is decided by domains.dnsMode and the refid (if any) is reconciler-populated runtime state owned by the network/cert layer, so it is REJECTED by this schema. mgmt-type environments may omit 'domains'. See ADR-007 P3.

name.description: Slug identifier for the environment (e.g. foo, bar, default, mgmt).

ownerOrg.description: Reference to the owning Organization.name (config/people/organizations/<ownerOrg>.json), validated.

domains.description: Public domain configuration. Optional — mgmt-type environments (internal-DNS only) omit it.

aliasMode.description: How aliases are served: redirect to primary, or mirror it.

dnsMode.description: DNS / certificate strategy. 'per-service' (default): Caddy issues per-host HTTP-01 certs, nothing to store. 'wildcard': OPNsense ACME issues one *.<primary> cert, refid is runtime state (NOT authored here). Decides cert ownership.

network.description: Network placement. NO vlan here — vlan lives in zones.json (CR-09).

zone.description: Reference to a zone key in zones.json (validated).

dataResidency.description: Where data for this environment may reside.

backup.description: Per-environment backup policy. null when not configured.

retention.description: Backup retention period (e.g. 7y, 5y, 1y). Overrides the site backup.defaultRetention for modules in this environment (ADR-007 P9 cascade).

residency.description: Data residency for this environment's backups (ADR-007 P9). eu-only forbids targeting a non-EU offsite. Defaults to the environment's top-level dataResidency when unset.

schedule.description: Environment-specific backup schedule (cron expression / PBS calendar event). null inherits the site-wide job schedule.

legal.description: Legal / processor metadata for this environment. null when not set.
